title: The PS2 Evangelion sequel
wikitext:
[]: The PS2 Evangelion sequel             Quote Post by dimix » Wed Jan 25, 2006 12:00 am The PS2 game is supposedly the sequel to the series... Is there like, an actual text translation of the game floating around somewhere? Or any substancial amount of information about the story? I've tried looking through the forums and google with no luck... I've got a feeling that this question has been asked many times, but meh...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 25, 2006 1:12 am Evangelion 2 is NOT a sequel to the series. It is just yet another game that lets you jump into the world of Evangelion and do what you want to do. Think of it as Evangelion and The Sims put together. While the game did add weight to several plot points from Evangelion, such as the fact that Adam and Lilith are seeds from an Alien Civilization as opposed to actual Angelic beings, it doesn't really offer anything more to Evangelion in terms of story. It has not and most likely will never be brought over. And judging by the volume of speech and text in the game, it is unlikely a fan translator will have the conviction to translate it. There have been a few Eva fans with Japanese profiencey enough to play the game, and they have said nothing particularly positive. It's not a very good game by western standards. If you love Japanese dating sim, choose your own adventure, or visual novel games, then you might like Evangelion 2, provided you're proficient in Japanese enough to play the game. In short, it isn't worth worrying about. I can think of quite a few things much more worthy of consideration for localization than Evangelion 2.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 25, 2006 1:28 am Neon Genesis Simvangelion! That would be disastrous, image Misato as one of your sims...

[]:             Quote Post by dimix » Wed Jan 25, 2006 6:30 am ahh good.. kinda relieved that its not a sequel.. It shouldn't be done as a graphic novel type.... It shouldn't be done at all...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 25, 2006 7:46 am SEELE 08 wrote: Neon Genesis Simvangelion! That would be disastrous, image Misato as one of your sims...

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Jan 25, 2006 10:24 am Someone (I think it was Shnooks) made an Eva sims house, with Misato, Kaji, Shinji and Asukatron.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Wed Jan 25, 2006 10:24 pm What is so wrong about making it a sims-like game? I played it, and it was pretty cool!! (Even though I only recommend fans to buy it!) And they got the new all-armored EVA 01(Bad design..)!!

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Jan 26, 2006 12:16 pm Space Penis wrote: Someone (I think it was Shnooks) made an Eva sims house, with Misato, Kaji, Shinji and Asukatron.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jan 26, 2006 12:30 pm I wish I had the Sims2 right now...I'd like to see a neighborhood of all the characters. Oh the fun that would be, just imagine the parties....

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Fri Jan 27, 2006 1:24 am Shnooks wrote: Space Penis wrote: Someone (I think it was Shnooks) made an Eva sims house, with Misato, Kaji, Shinji and Asukatron.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Feb 01, 2006 5:06 am Psh. I'm probably going to go out and pick it up someday in the future... Or maybe not at all. I do want it, but I couldn't play it easily. The last time I tried playing a Japanese game that wasn't translated (Dragon Quest 5) it ended badly... I had to resort to walkthrus to get through the game.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Feb 01, 2006 3:09 pm I'm hoping that this is dubbed in English and made available in the U.S.

[]:             Quote Post by wakethedead » Wed Feb 01, 2006 7:53 pm I have this game for the pc.. but it's all in Japanese. I can only look at the pretty pictures and try to figure out whats going on. If anyone has played girlfriend of steel 1 its about the same except better animation.

[]:             Quote Post by jonneh » Fri Feb 03, 2006 3:45 pm I have this game for the pc.. but it's all in Japanese.

[]:             Quote Post by wakethedead » Fri Feb 03, 2006 5:24 pm I found it on www.torrentspy.com if you type girlfriend of steel you will find it.

[]:             Quote Post by jonneh » Fri Feb 03, 2006 9:56 pm Oh I see, thanks a lot. :) I'm probably going to get this off ebay someday soon too, even though it'd be a waste of money.
